title: **Local Wellness Initiative Encourages Parents to Unwind**
excerpt:
**Local Wellness Initiative Encourages Parents to Unwind**

Rochdale – A local initiative, Serenity Soul, has announced a new programme aimed at providing parents with an opportunity to relax and reju...
content_html:
**Local Wellness Initiative Encourages Parents to Unwind**

Rochdale – A local initiative, Serenity Soul, has announced a new programme aimed at providing parents with an opportunity to relax and rejuvenate. The initiative invites parents to take a well-deserved break, encouraging them to prioritise their well-being. Further details on the programme will be made available soon.

title: **Kingsway Park School Parents Seek Clarification on Payment Code**
excerpt:
**Kingsway Park School Parents Seek Clarification on Payment Code**

Rochdale, UK – Parents of students at Kingsway Park School are seeking clarification regarding the distribution of the Parent Pay c...
content_html:
**Kingsway Park School Parents Seek Clarification on Payment Code**

Rochdale, UK – Parents of students at Kingsway Park School are seeking clarification regarding the distribution of the Parent Pay code. A member of the community, Louise Merriman, inquired on social media whether the school would provide the necessary code for the payment system tomorrow. Other parents have been encouraged to check the Kingsway Park School Parent Group for further assistance on the matter.

title: **Kingsway Park School Parent Group Encourages Community Engagement**
excerpt:
**Kingsway Park School Parent Group Encourages Community Engagement**

The Kingsway Park School Parent Group is inviting parents and guardians to actively participate in discussions. The group serves ...
content_html:
**Kingsway Park School Parent Group Encourages Community Engagement**

The Kingsway Park School Parent Group is inviting parents and guardians to actively participate in discussions. The group serves as a platform for sharing information and resources related to the school community. Members are encouraged to contribute and support one another as part of this collaborative initiative.

title: **Community Seeks Italian Language Classes**
excerpt:
**Community Seeks Italian Language Classes**

Rochdale residents are seeking information on Italian language classes available in the area. Linda Jackson posted in a local Facebook group, inquiring ab...
content_html:
**Community Seeks Italian Language Classes**

Rochdale residents are seeking information on Italian language classes available in the area. Linda Jackson posted in a local Facebook group, inquiring about face-to-face classroom settings rather than online courses. Community members are encouraged to share any recommendations for classes within reasonable travelling distance.

title: **Community Members Recommend Local Jewellers for Custom Pendants**
excerpt:
**Community Members Recommend Local Jewellers for Custom Pendants**

Rochdale, UK - Residents of Rochdale have turned to a community Facebook group seeking recommendations for jewellers who can melt d...
content_html:
**Community Members Recommend Local Jewellers for Custom Pendants**

Rochdale, UK - Residents of Rochdale have turned to a community Facebook group seeking recommendations for jewellers who can melt down gold and create custom pendants.

One member suggested a jeweller located at the back of the market in Rochdale, while another resident recommended Harvey’s in Middleton, noting the establishment's long-standing reputation of over 45 years and the exemplary service provided by its proprietor.

Community engagement continues as locals share their experiences and suggestions for custom jewellery services.

title: **Rochdale Market Seller Gains Attention for Unique Offerings**
excerpt:
**Rochdale Market Seller Gains Attention for Unique Offerings**

Rochdale, UK – A vendor located at the rear of Rochdale Market has recently attracted local interest for his unique products. The selle...
content_html:
**Rochdale Market Seller Gains Attention for Unique Offerings**

Rochdale, UK – A vendor located at the rear of Rochdale Market has recently attracted local interest for his unique products. The seller, whose identity has not been disclosed, has been noted for providing distinctive items that have caught the attention of shoppers. Community members have taken to social media to express their appreciation for his offerings, highlighting the diverse range of goods available at the market. Further details about the vendor's products or background have yet to be revealed.

title: **Local Jeweller Celebrates Over 45 Years of Service**
excerpt:
**Local Jeweller Celebrates Over 45 Years of Service**

Middleton – Tracy Duncan, a resident of the area, has highlighted the longstanding reputation of Harvey’s Jewellers in Middleton, which has been...
content_html:
**Local Jeweller Celebrates Over 45 Years of Service**

Middleton – Tracy Duncan, a resident of the area, has highlighted the longstanding reputation of Harvey’s Jewellers in Middleton, which has been serving customers for over 45 years. Known for its commitment to quality craftsmanship, the shop is praised for its exemplary customer service. Duncan expressed her appreciation for the jeweller, describing the owner as a true gentleman.

title: Arrests after late-night burglary in Heywood
excerpt: Police made two arrests after reports of a late-night burglary near York Street, Heywood.
content_html: Greater Manchester Police confirmed two suspects were detained after officers responded to reports of a break-in near York Street just after midnight. No injuries were reported and enquiries are ongoing.
quotes: Saw flashing lights at around 12:15am – brilliant response time.
Glad no one was hurt. Thank you GMP.

title: Rochdale town centre roadworks: weekend closures announced
excerpt: Temporary closures will be in place this weekend to resurface parts of Yorkshire Street.
content_html: Rochdale Borough Council says diversions will be signposted and buses will continue to run. Drivers are advised to allow extra travel time.
quotes: About time those potholes were fixed!
Please keep access open for businesses.

title: Littleborough school fete raises £4,200 for new library
excerpt: Parents and pupils celebrated a successful summer fete supporting the library project.
content_html: Headteacher Ms. Khan said the funds will go towards books and reading spaces open to the community after school hours.
quotes: The kids can’t wait for the new reading nook!

title: Appeal: witnesses after collision in Milnrow
excerpt: Police are appealing for dashcam footage after a collision on Newhey Road, Milnrow.
content_html: Any witnesses are asked to contact 101 quoting log 2178 of today’s date.
quotes: I drove past just after it happened.

title: Councillors back motion to expand town centre CCTV
excerpt: The council supported a plan to extend CCTV coverage across key town centre spots.
content_html: The motion passed 27-14. Installation is expected later this year, pending procurement.
quotes: Good step for safety if used responsibly.
